content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 12, 2003

Thomas J. Harron, Sp. Asst. County
County of San Diego
Office of County Counsel
1600 Pacific Highway, Room 355
San Diego, CA 92101-2469

Re: Request for Advice
File No. W-03-102

Dear Mr. Harron:

This letter is in response to your request for written confirmation of telephone advice rendered on the County of San Diego’s plan to segment its actions on a draft general plan land use map.

The Fair Political Practices Commission does not “confirm” telephone advice by way of written advice.

We are therefore, treating your May 7, 2003 request as withdrawn.

Should you have any questions regarding this Commission policy, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel
